text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Aww, that's a shame. These things are really
difficult.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no need to apologize! It really means a lot
to me that you tried to get them for my sisters. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Don't feel bad, Trainer! Just think of it as an
offering to the claw machine!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Luck always comes around full circle! Today, you
donated a little luck to the world. It's bound to
come back to you sooner or later! ☆
